Covetrus — Official Brand Standards

Brand Guide

Everything you need to create consistent, on-brand experiences across software, documents, marketing, and AI-generated content.

01 — Logo

Logo Variants

Eight approved logo variants for every context. Download in SVG, PNG, or JPG directly from each card.

SVG — Scalable, ideal for web & dev
PNG — Transparent background, general use
JPG — PowerPoint & presentations
Full Wordmark — RGB
Primary. White or light backgrounds.
SVG PNG JPG
Full Wordmark — Knockout
Dark or colored backgrounds.
SVG PNG
Full Wordmark — Black
Single-color, light backgrounds.
SVG PNG JPG
Full Wordmark — White
Dark backgrounds, single-color white.
SVG PNG
Icon / Bug — RGB
App icons, favicons, social avatars.
SVG PNG JPG
Icon / Bug — Knockout
Icon use on dark backgrounds.
SVG PNG
Icon / Bug — Black
Single-color, light backgrounds.
PNG JPG
Icon / Bug — White
Dark backgrounds, single-color white.
PNG

✓ Do

  • Use SVG for all web, app, and screen contexts
  • Use PNG when transparency is needed (presentations, overlays)
  • Use JPG for PowerPoint slides and email signatures
  • Use the KO/White variants on dark or colored backgrounds
  • Maintain clear space equal to the height of the “C” on all sides

× Don't

  • Recolor, rotate, skew, or distort the logo in any way
  • Add shadows, outlines, gradients, or effects
  • Use the RGB logo on dark backgrounds
  • Use the wordmark smaller than 120px wide on screen
  • Need a large-format JPG? Contact the Design Team

03 — Typography

Type System

Mulish is the Covetrus brand typeface — a clean, geometric sans-serif with excellent legibility at all sizes.

H1 / Display
Advancing Vet Medicine
Mulish 900 · 48px
H2 / Section
Smarter Solutions
Mulish 800 · 36px
H3 / Card Title
Product Features
Mulish 700 · 24px
Body
Covetrus partners with veterinary professionals to provide the technology, products, and expertise they need to run a thriving practice.
Mulish 400 · 16px
Small / Caption
Last updated May 2026 · Version 1.0
Mulish 400 · 14px
Label / Tag
Brand Standards
Mulish 800 · 12px caps

Font Download

The Mulish variable font file supports weights 200–900 in a single file.

Download Mulish Font (.ttf)
04 — Voice & Tone

Voice & Tone

Covetrus sounds confident, clear, warm, and forward-looking. We are a partner, not a vendor.

Confident

Speak with authority. We are experts. Avoid hedging language like “might,” “perhaps,” or “we think.”

Clear

Avoid jargon. If technical terms are necessary, define them. Short sentences win.

Warm

Use “you” and “we” freely. We’re in this together with veterinary professionals.

Forward-looking

Emphasize progress, innovation, and possibility. Lead with what can be achieved.

Grounded

Back every claim with substance. No empty marketing speak or buzzwords.

✓ Write This

  • Active voice: “We ship globally”
  • Use Oxford commas
  • Keep key messages under 25 words
  • “Covetrus” — always capitalize correctly
  • Preferred: reliable, use, leading, transformative

× Not This

  • Passive voice: “Products are shipped globally”
  • Acronyms in first reference without definition
  • Avoid: leverage, synergy, seamlessly, robust, best-in-class
  • “covetrus” or “COVETRUS” — incorrect capitalizations
  • Exclamation marks in professional/B2B contexts

08 — AI Pairing

Pair This Guide with AI

Download the machine-readable version and attach it to Claude, Copilot, or any AI tool for brand-consistent outputs every time.

1

Download the .md File

Get the structured Markdown version of this entire brand guide — optimized for AI ingestion.

2

Create a Claude Project

Go to claude.ai → Projects → New Project. Upload the .md file as a knowledge document.

3

Every Chat is On-Brand

Every conversation in that Project automatically has full brand context — colors, tone, typography, and rules.

4

Works With Any AI Tool

Attach the .md to ChatGPT, Cursor, Copilot, or any LLM. Drop it in a system prompt for instant brand alignment.

// Example prompt when using the brand guide in Claude
"Using the Covetrus brand guide, write a LinkedIn post
announcing our new product feature. Tone: warm and confident.
Include a CTA. Keep it under 200 words."
Covetrus Brand Guide · Last updated May 2026 · For questions contact the Brand team
